```javascript
function startPlatformer() {
    showScreen('game-screen');
    platformerCanvas = document.getElementById('game-canvas');
    platformerCtx = platformerCanvas.getContext('2d');
    
    // Set canvas size
    platformerCanvas.width = window.innerWidth;
    platformerCanvas.height = window.innerHeight;
    
    // Reset player
    player.x = 100;
    player.y = 300;
    player.velocityX = 0;
    player.velocityY = 0;
    
    // Create level
    createLevel1();
    
    // Start game loop
    if (gameLoop) cancelAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
    gameLoop = requestAnimationFrame(updatePlatformer);
}

function createLevel1() {
    platforms = [];
    swingPoints = [];
    
    const canvasHeight = platformerCanvas.height;
    
    // Starting platform
    platforms.push({ x: 0, y: canvasHeight - 100, width: 300, height: 30, type: 'cloud' });
    
    // Platforms going right with some moving ones
    platforms.push({ x: 350, y: canvasHeight - 150, width: 150, height: 25, type: 'cloud' });
    platforms.push({ x: 550, y: canvasHeight - 220, width: 120, height: 25, type: 'cloud', moving: true, moveRange: 50, moveSpeed: 2 });
    platforms.push({ x: 750, y: canvasHeight - 280, width: 100, height: 25, type: 'cloud' });
    
    // Swing point section
    swingPoints.push({ x: 950, y: canvasHeight - 400 });
    platforms.push({ x: 1100, y: canvasHeight - 300, width: 120, height: 25, type: 'cloud' });
    
    // More platforms
    platforms.push({ x: 1300, y: canvasHeight - 350, width: 100, height: 25, type: 'cloud', moving: true, moveRange: 80, moveSpeed: 1.5 });
    platforms.push({ x: 1500, y: canvasHeight - 280, width: 150, height: 25, type: 'cloud' });
    
    // Second swing section
    swingPoints.push({ x: 1700, y: canvasHeight - 380 });
    swingPoints.push({ x: 1900, y: canvasHeight - 350 });
    
    platforms.push({ x: 2050, y: canvasHeight - 250, width: 150, height: 25, type: 'cloud' });
    platforms.push({ x: 2250, y: canvasHeight - 200, width: 120, height: 25, type: 'cloud', moving: true, moveRange: 60, moveSpeed: 2.5 });
    
    // Final stretch
    platforms.push({ x: 2450, y: canvasHeight - 150, width: 200, height: 25, type: 'cloud' });
    platforms.push({ x: 2700, y: canvasHeight - 180, width: 150, height: 25, type: 'cloud' });
    
    // End platform (boss area)
    platforms.push({ x: 2900, y: canvasHeight - 100, width: 400, height: 30, type: 'boss-platform', isEnd: true });
}

function updatePlatformer() {
    if (GameState.currentScreen !== 'game-screen') return;
    
    // Clear canvas
    platformerCtx.clearRect(0, 0, platformerCanvas.width, platformerCanvas.height);
    
    // Draw sky background
    drawSkyBackground();
    
    // Update moving platforms
    platforms.forEach(p => {
        if (p.moving) {
            if (!p.originalX) p.originalX = p.x;
            if (!p.direction) p.direction = 1;
            p.x += p.moveSpeed * p.direction;
            if (p.x > p.originalX + p.moveRange || p.x < p.originalX - p.moveRange) {
                p.direction *= -1;
            }
        }
    });
    
    // Player physics
    if (!isSwinging) {
        // Gravity
        player.velocityY += 0.8;
        
        // Movement
        if (keys['ArrowLeft'] || keys['KeyA']) {
            player.velocityX = -6;
            player.facingRight = false;
        } else if (keys['ArrowRight'] || keys['KeyD']) {
            player.velocityX = 6;
            player.facingRight = true;
        } else {
            player.velocityX *= 0.8;
        }
        
        // Jump
        if ((keys['ArrowUp'] || keys['KeyW'] || keys['Space']) && player.onGround) {
            player.velocityY = -18;
            player.onGround = false;
        }
        
        // Apply velocity
        player.x += player.velocityX;
        player.y += player.velocityY;
        
        // Platform collision - improved to not kick player off
        player.onGround = false;
        let onMovingPlatform = null;
        
        platforms.forEach(p => {
            // Calculate platform screen position
            const platScreenX = p.x - camera.x;
            
            // Check if player is above and landing on platform
            if (player.x + player.width - 10 > platScreenX && 
                player.x + 10 < platScreenX + p.width &&
                player.y + player.height >= p.y - 5 &&
                player.y + player.height <= p.y + p.height + 15 &&
                player.velocityY >= 0) {
                
                player.y = p.y - player.height;
                player.velocityY = 0;
                player.onGround = true;
                
                // Remember if on moving platform
                if (p.moving) {
                    onMovingPlatform = p;
                }
                
                // Check if reached end
                if (p.isEnd && !levelComplete) {
                    levelComplete = true;
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        startCutscene('beforeBoss');
                    }, 500);
                }
            }
        });
        
        // Apply moving platform movement AFTER collision check
        if (onMovingPlatform) {
            // Move player with platform smoothly
            player.x += onMovingPlatform.moveSpeed * onMovingPlatform.direction;
        }
        
        // Fall death - show death screen
        if (player.y > platformerCanvas.height + 100) {
            GameState.health -= 25;
            updateHealthUI();
            
            if (GameState.health <= 0) {
                showDeathScreen('platformer');
                return;
            } else {
                // Respawn at last checkpoint
                player.x = 100;
                player.y = 300;
                camera.x = 0;
            }
        }
        
        // Check for zero health
        if (GameState.health <= 0) {
            showDeathScreen('platformer');
            return;
        }
    } else {
        // Swinging physics
        swingAngle += 0.05;
        const swingRadius = 150;
        player.x = currentSwingPoint.x - camera.x + Math.sin(swingAngle) * swingRadius - player.width / 2;
        player.y = currentSwingPoint.y + Math.cos(swingAngle) * swingRadius - player.height / 2;
        
        // Release swing
        if (keys['Space'] || keys['ArrowUp'] || keys['KeyW']) {
            isSwinging = false;
            player.velocityX = Math.cos(swingAngle) * 15;
            player.velocityY = -Math.abs(Math.sin(swingAngle)) * 15;
            keys['Space'] = false;
            keys['ArrowUp'] = false;
            keys['KeyW'] = false;
        }
    }
    
    // Camera follow
    const targetCameraX = player.x - platformerCanvas.width / 3;
    camera.x += (targetCameraX - camera.x) * 0.1;
    if (camera.x < 0) camera.x = 0;
    
    // Draw platforms
    platforms.forEach(p => {
        drawCloud(p.x - camera.x, p.y, p.width, p.height, p.type === 'boss-platform');
    });
    
    // Draw swing points
    swingPoints.forEach(sp => {
        drawSwingPoint(sp.x - camera.x, sp.y);
        
        // Check if player can grab
        if (!isSwinging && keys['Digit3']) {
            const dist = Math.hypot(player.x + player.width/2 - (sp.x - camera.x), player.y - sp.y);
            if (dist < 200) {
                isSwinging = true;
                currentSwingPoint = sp;
                swingAngle = Math.atan2(player.x + player.width/2 - (sp.x - camera.x), player.y - sp.y);
                keys['Digit3'] = false;
            }
        }
    });
    
    // Draw swing rope
    if (isSwinging && currentSwingPoint) {
        platformerCtx.strokeStyle = '#8B4513';
        platformerCtx.lineWidth = 4;
        platformerCtx.beginPath();
        platformerCtx.moveTo(currentSwingPoint.x - camera.x, currentSwingPoint.y);
        platformerCtx.lineTo(player.x + player.width/2, player.y + player.height/2);
        platformerCtx.stroke();
    }
    
    // Draw Zoink companion
    zoinkCompanion.x = player.x - 40;
    zoinkCompanion.y = player.y + 20;
    drawZoink(zoinkCompanion.x, zoinkCompanion.y, 40);
    
    // Draw player
    drawPlayer(player.x, player.y);
    
    // Draw UI hints
    drawUIHints();
    
    gameLoop = requestAnimationFrame(updatePlatformer);
}

function drawSkyBackground() {
    // Sky gradient
    const gradient = platformerCtx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, platformerCanvas.height);
    gradient.addColorStop(0, '#87CEEB');
    gradient.addColorStop(0.5, '#B8E4F9');
    gradient.addColorStop(1, '#E0F6FF');
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = gradient;
    platformerCtx.fillRect(0, 0, platformerCanvas.width, platformerCanvas.height);
    
    // Background clouds
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5)';
    for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
        const x = ((i * 400) - camera.x * 0.3) % (platformerCanvas.width + 200) - 100;
        const y = 100 + i * 50;
        drawCloudShape(x, y, 100 + i * 20);
    }
}

function drawCloudShape(x, y, size) {
    platformerCtx.beginPath();
    platformerCtx.arc(x, y, size * 0.4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.arc(x + size * 0.3, y - size * 0.1, size * 0.35, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.arc(x + size * 0.6, y, size * 0.4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.arc(x + size * 0.3, y + size * 0.1, size * 0.3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.fill();
}

function drawCloud(x, y, width, height, isBoss) {
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = isBoss ? '#FFD700' : 'white';
    platformerCtx.shadowColor = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)';
    platformerCtx.shadowBlur = 10;
    platformerCtx.shadowOffsetY = 5;
    
    // Main cloud platform
    platformerCtx.beginPath();
    platformerCtx.ellipse(x + width/2, y + height/2, width/2, height, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.fill();
    
    // Fluffy top
    for (let i = 0; i < width; i += 30) {
        platformerCtx.beginPath();
        platformerCtx.arc(x + 15 + i, y, 20, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        platformerCtx.fill();
    }
    
    platformerCtx.shadowColor = 'transparent';
    
    if (isBoss) {
        // Draw "BOSS" indicator
        platformerCtx.fillStyle = '#DC143C';
        platformerCtx.font = 'bold 20px Fredoka One';
        platformerCtx.fillText('→ BOSS', x + width/2 - 40, y - 30);
    }
}

function drawSwingPoint(x, y) {
    // Antler hook (Zoink's antler swing point)
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = '#8B4513';
    platformerCtx.beginPath();
    platformerCtx.moveTo(x, y);
    platformerCtx.lineTo(x - 15, y - 40);
    platformerCtx.lineTo(x, y - 30);
    platformerCtx.lineTo(x + 15, y - 40);
    platformerCtx.closePath();
    platformerCtx.fill();
    
    // Glow effect
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.3)';
    platformerCtx.beginPath();
    platformerCtx.arc(x, y, 30, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.fill();
    
    // Label
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = '#FFD700';
    platformerCtx.font = '14px Nunito';
    platformerCtx.fillText('Press 3 to Swing!', x - 50, y + 50);
}

function drawZoink(x, y, size) {
    // Body
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = '#FFD700';
    platformerCtx.beginPath();
    platformerCtx.arc(x + size/2, y + size/2, size/2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.fill();
    
    // Antlers
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = '#8B4513';
    platformerCtx.beginPath();
    platformerCtx.moveTo(x + size * 0.3, y + size * 0.2);
    platformerCtx.lineTo(x + size * 0.15, y - size * 0.2);
    platformerCtx.lineTo(x + size * 0.35, y + size * 0.1);
    platformerCtx.fill();
    
    platformerCtx.beginPath();
    platformerCtx.moveTo(x + size * 0.7, y + size * 0.2);
    platformerCtx.lineTo(x + size * 0.85, y - size * 0.2);
    platformerCtx.lineTo(x + size * 0.65, y + size * 0.1);
    platformerCtx.fill();
    
    // Eyes
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a';
    platformerCtx.beginPath();
    platformerCtx.arc(x + size * 0.35, y + size * 0.4, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.arc(x + size * 0.65, y + size * 0.4, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.fill();
    
    // Pink snout
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = '#FFB6C1';
    platformerCtx.beginPath();
    platformerCtx.ellipse(x + size/2, y + size * 0.6, size * 0.2, size * 0.12, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.fill();
    
    // Nostrils
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a';
    platformerCtx.beginPath();
    platformerCtx.arc(x + size * 0.42, y + size * 0.6, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.arc(x + size * 0.58, y + size * 0.6, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.fill();
}

function drawPlayer(x, y) {
    const hairColor = GameState.playerGender === 'female' ? '#F5DEB3' : '#8B4513';
    const shirtColor = GameState.playerGender === 'female' ? '#FFB6C1' : '#4CAF50';
    
    // Body
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = shirtColor;
    platformerCtx.fillRect(x + 10, y + 30, 30, 40);
    
    // Head
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = '#FFE4C4';
    platformerCtx.beginPath();
    platformerCtx.arc(x + 25, y + 20, 18, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.fill();
    
    // Hair
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = hairColor;
    platformerCtx.beginPath();
    platformerCtx.arc(x + 25, y + 15, 18, Math.PI, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.fill();
    
    // Eyes
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a';
    const eyeOffsetX = player.facingRight ? 3 : -3;
    platformerCtx.beginPath();
    platformerCtx.arc(x + 20 + eyeOffsetX, y + 18, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.arc(x + 30 + eyeOffsetX, y + 18, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.fill();
    
    // Legs
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = '#4a4a4a';
    platformerCtx.fillRect(x + 12, y + 55, 10, 15);
    platformerCtx.fillRect(x + 28, y + 55, 10, 15);
}

function drawUIHints() {
    // Only show keyboard hints on desktop (not touch devices)
    const isTouchDevice = ('ontouchstart' in window) || (navigator.maxTouchPoints > 0);
    
    if (!isTouchDevice && window.innerWidth > 1024) {
        platformerCtx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.7)';
        platformerCtx.fillRect(10, platformerCanvas.height - 80, 250, 70);
        platformerCtx.fillStyle = 'white';
        platformerCtx.font = '14px Nunito';
        platformerCtx.fillText('← → or A/D: Move', 20, platformerCanvas.height - 55);
        platformerCtx.fillText('↑ or W or Space: Jump', 20, platformerCanvas.height - 35);
        platformerCtx.fillText('3: Use Antler Swing (near hooks)', 20, platformerCanvas.height - 15);
    }
}

function updateHealthUI() {
    const healthFill = document.querySelector('#game-ui .health-fill');
    const healthText = document.querySelector('#game-ui .health-text');
    if (healthFill && healthText) {
        healthFill.style.width = `${(GameState.health / GameState.maxHealth) * 150}px`;
        healthText.textContent = GameState.health;
    }
}

// ============== BOSS BATTLE ==============

let bossCanvas, bossCtx;
let bossLoop;
let boss = {
    x: 600,
    y: 400,
    width: 100,
    height: 100,
    health: 100,
    maxHealth: 100,
    state: 'idle', // idle, punching, flying, landing
    targetX: 0,
    targetY: 0,
    flyTimer: 0,
    attackCooldown: 0,
    lastPlayerPositions: []
};
let battlePlayer = {
    x: 200,
    y: 400,
    width: 50,
    height: 70,
    velocityX: 0,
    velocityY: 0,
    onGround: true,
    health: 100,
    attackCooldown: 0
};
let dangerZone = null;
let bossVoiceLine = '';
let voiceLineTimer = 0;

function startBossBattle() {
    showScreen('boss-screen');
    bossCanvas = document.getElementById('boss-canvas');
    bossCtx = bossCanvas.getContext('2d');
    
    bossCanvas.width = window.innerWidth;
    bossCanvas.height = window.innerHeight;
    
    // Reset
    boss.health = 100;
    boss.state = 'idle';
    boss.attackCooldown = 60;
    battlePlayer.health = 100;
    battlePlayer.x = 200;
    battlePlayer.y = bossCanvas.height - 200;
    bossVoiceLine = 'HOW DARE YOU!';
    voiceLineTimer = 120;
    
    if (bossLoop) cancelAnimationFrame(bossLoop);
    bossLoop = requestAnimationFrame(updateBossBattle);
}

function updateBossBattle() {
    if (GameState.currentScreen !== 'boss-screen') return;
    
    // Clear
    bossCtx.clearRect(0, 0, bossCanvas.width, bossCanvas.height);
    
    // Draw background
    drawBossBackground();
    
    // Ground
    const groundY = bossCanvas.height - 100;
    bossCtx.fillStyle = '#2d3436';
    bossCtx.fillRect(0, groundY, bossCanvas.width, 100);
    
    // Update player
    updateBattlePlayer(groundY);
    
    // Store player position history (for delayed attack)
    boss.lastPlayerPositions.push({ x: battlePlayer.x, y: battlePlayer.y, time: Date.now() });
    if (boss.lastPlayerPositions.length > 180) { // 3 seconds at 60fps
        boss.lastPlayerPositions.shift();
    }
    
    // Update boss
    updateBoss(groundY);
    
    // Draw danger zone
    if (dangerZone) {
        bossCtx.fillStyle = 'rgba(220, 20, 60, 0.4)';
        bossCtx.beginPath();
        bossCtx.arc(dangerZone.x, dangerZone.y, 80, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        bossCtx.fill();
        
        bossCtx.strokeStyle = '#DC143C';
        bossCtx.lineWidth = 3;
        bossCtx.beginPath();
        bossCtx.arc(dangerZone.x, dangerZone.y, 80, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        bossCtx.stroke();
    }
    
    // Draw boss
    drawBoss();
    
    // Draw player
    drawBattlePlayer();
    
    // Draw Zoink companion
    drawZoink(battlePlayer.x - 50, battlePlayer.y + 20, 35);
    
    // Draw voice line
    if (voiceLineTimer > 0) {
        bossCtx.fillStyle = 'white';
        bossCtx.font = 'bold 24px Fredoka One';
        bossCtx.fillText(bossVoiceLine, boss.x - 50, boss.y - 70);
        voiceLineTimer--;
    }
    
    // Update UI
    updateBossUI();
    
    // Check win/lose
    if (boss.health <= 0) {
        setTimeout(() => {
            startCutscene('afterBoss');
        }, 1000);
        return;
    }
    
    if (battlePlayer.health <= 0) {
        // Show death screen instead of auto-reset
        showDeathScreen('boss');
        return;
    }
    
    bossLoop = requestAnimationFrame(updateBossBattle);
}

function drawBossBackground() {
    const gradient = bossCtx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, bossCanvas.height);
    gradient.addColorStop(0, '#1a1a2e');
    gradient.addColorStop(0.5, '#2d3436');
    gradient.addColorStop(1, '#1a1a1a');
    bossCtx.fillStyle = gradient;
    bossCtx.fillRect(0, 0, bossCanvas.width, bossCanvas.height);
    
    // Dramatic clouds
    bossCtx.fillStyle = 'rgba(100, 100, 100, 0.3)';
    for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
        drawCloudShape(100 + i * 300, 150 + i * 30, 150);
    }
}

function updateBattlePlayer(groundY) {
    // Movement
    if (keys['ArrowLeft'] || keys['KeyA']) {
        battlePlayer.velocityX = -5;
    } else if (keys['ArrowRight'] || keys['KeyD']) {
        battlePlayer.velocityX = 5;
    } else {
        battlePlayer.velocityX *= 0.8;
    }
    
    // Jump
    if ((keys['ArrowUp'] || keys['KeyW'] || keys['Space']) && battlePlayer.onGround) {
        battlePlayer.velocityY = -15;
        battlePlayer.onGround = false;
    }
    
    // Gravity
    if (!battlePlayer.onGround) {
        battlePlayer.velocityY += 0.8;
    }
    
    // Apply velocity
    battlePlayer.x += battlePlayer.velocityX;
    battlePlayer.y += battlePlayer.velocityY;
    
    // Ground collision
    if (battlePlayer.y + battlePlayer.height > groundY) {
        battlePlayer.y = groundY - battlePlayer.height;
        battlePlayer.velocityY = 0;
        battlePlayer.onGround = true;
    }
    
    // Bounds
    if (battlePlayer.x < 0) battlePlayer.x = 0;
    if (battlePlayer.x + battlePlayer.width > bossCanvas.width) {
        battlePlayer.x = bossCanvas.width - battlePlayer.width;
    }
    
    // Attack cooldown
    if (battlePlayer.attackCooldown > 0) battlePlayer.attackCooldown--;
    
    // Attacks
    if (keys['Digit1'] && battlePlayer.attackCooldown === 0) {
        // Pounce attack
        performPounceAttack();
        battlePlayer.attackCooldown = 30;
    }
    if (keys['Digit2'] && battlePlayer.attackCooldown === 0) {
        // Gun attack
        performGunAttack();
        battlePlayer.attackCooldown = 45;
    }
}

function performPounceAttack() {
    const dist = Math.hypot(battlePlayer.x - boss.x, battlePlayer.y - boss.y);
    if (dist < 150) {
        boss.health -= 10;
        bossVoiceLine = 'ARGH!';
        voiceLineTimer = 60;
    }
}

function performGunAttack() {
    // Always hits but less damage
    boss.health -= 5;
    
    // Draw projectile effect (simple)
    bossCtx.strokeStyle = '#FFD700';
    bossCtx.lineWidth = 3;
    bossCtx.beginPath();
    bossCtx.moveTo(battlePlayer.x + battlePlayer.width, battlePlayer.y + battlePlayer.height / 2);
    bossCtx.lineTo(boss.x, boss.y + boss.height / 2);
    bossCtx.stroke();
}

function updateBoss(groundY) {
    boss.attackCooldown--;
    
    if (boss.attackCooldown <= 0) {
        // Choose attack
        if (Math.random() < 0.5) {
            // Delayed ground punch - hits where player was 3 seconds ago
            boss.state = 'punching';
            const targetPos = boss.lastPlayerPositions[0] || { x: battlePlayer.x, y: groundY };
            boss.targetX = targetPos.x;
            boss.targetY = groundY - 50;
            boss.attackCooldown = 120;
            bossVoiceLine = 'TAKE THIS!';
            voiceLineTimer = 60;
        } else {
            // Flying pounce attack
            boss.state = 'flying';
            boss.flyTimer = 60;
            boss.targetX = battlePlayer.x;
            boss.targetY = groundY - boss.height;
            dangerZone = { x: battlePlayer.x + battlePlayer.width/2, y: groundY - 40 };
            boss.attackCooldown = 180;
            bossVoiceLine = 'AAAAAGRRH!';
            voiceLineTimer = 90;
        }
    }
    
    // Boss state machine
    switch (boss.state) {
        case 'punching':
            // Move towards target position from 3 seconds ago
            boss.x += (boss.targetX - boss.x) * 0.1;
            if (Math.abs(boss.x - boss.targetX) < 50) {
                // Check if player is hit
                if (Math.abs(battlePlayer.x - boss.targetX) < 80) {
                    battlePlayer.health -= 15;
                }
                boss.state = 'idle';
            }
            break;
            
        case 'flying':
            // Fly up
            boss.y -= 10;
            boss.flyTimer--;
            if (boss.flyTimer <= 0) {
                boss.state = 'landing';
            }
            break;
            
        case 'landing':
            // Slam down at danger zone
            boss.x = dangerZone.x - boss.width / 2;
            boss.y += 25;
            if (boss.y >= groundY - boss.height) {
                boss.y = groundY - boss.height;
                // Check if player is in danger zone
                const dist = Math.hypot(battlePlayer.x + battlePlayer.width/2 - dangerZone.x, 
                                       battlePlayer.y + battlePlayer.height/2 - dangerZone.y);
                if (dist < 100) {
                    battlePlayer.health -= 25;
                }
                dangerZone = null;
                boss.state = 'idle';
            }
            break;
            
        default:
            // Idle - slowly follow player
            if (boss.x < battlePlayer.x - 100) boss.x += 2;
            if (boss.x > battlePlayer.x + 100) boss.x -= 2;
            boss.y = groundY - boss.height;
    }
}

function drawBoss() {
    // Zip - black scruffy ball with white eyes
    bossCtx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a';
    
    // Scruffy body
    bossCtx.beginPath();
    bossCtx.arc(boss.x + boss.width/2, boss.y + boss.height/2, boss.width/2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    bossCtx.fill();
    
    // Scruffy spikes
    for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
        const angle = (i / 8) * Math.PI * 2;
        const spikeX = boss.x + boss.width/2 + Math.cos(angle) * (boss.width/2 + 10);
        const spikeY = boss.y + boss.height/2 + Math.sin(angle) * (boss.height/2 + 10);
        bossCtx.beginPath();
        bossCtx.arc(spikeX, spikeY, 15, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        bossCtx.fill();
    }
    
    // White eyes
    bossCtx.fillStyle = 'white';
    bossCtx.beginPath();
    bossCtx.arc(boss.x + boss.width * 0.35, boss.y + boss.height * 0.4, 15, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    bossCtx.arc(boss.x + boss.width * 0.65, boss.y + boss.height * 0.4, 15, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    bossCtx.fill();
    
    // Pupils
    bossCtx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a';
    bossCtx.beginPath();
    bossCtx.arc(boss.x + boss.width * 0.35, boss.y + boss.height * 0.4, 5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    bossCtx.arc(boss.x + boss.width * 0.65, boss.y + boss.height * 0.4, 5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    bossCtx.fill();
    
    // Angry mouth with teeth
    bossCtx.fillStyle = '#DC143C';
    bossCtx.beginPath();
    bossCtx.arc(boss.x + boss.width/2, boss.y + boss.height * 0.7, 20, 0, Math.PI);
    bossCtx.fill();
    
    // Teeth
    bossCtx.fillStyle = 'white';
    for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
        bossCtx.beginPath();
        bossCtx.moveTo(boss.x + boss.width * 0.35 + i * 8, boss.y + boss.height * 0.7);
        bossCtx.lineTo(boss.x + boss.width * 0.35 + i * 8 + 4, boss.y + boss.height * 0.8);
        bossCtx.lineTo(boss.x + boss.width * 0.35 + i * 8 + 8, boss.y + boss.height * 0.7);
        bossCtx.fill();
    }
}

function drawBattlePlayer() {
    const hairColor = GameState.playerGender === 'female' ? '#F5DEB3' : '#8B4513';
    const shirtColor = GameState.playerGender === 'female' ? '#FFB6C1' : '#4CAF50';
    
    // Body
    bossCtx.fillStyle = shirtColor;
    bossCtx.fillRect(battlePlayer.x + 10, battlePlayer.y + 30, 30, 40);
    
    // Head
    bossCtx.fillStyle = '#FFE4C4';
    bossCtx.beginPath();
    bossCtx.arc(battlePlayer.x + 25, battlePlayer.y + 20, 18, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    bossCtx.fill();
    
    // Hair
    bossCtx.fillStyle = hairColor;
    bossCtx.beginPath();
    bossCtx.arc(battlePlayer.x + 25, battlePlayer.y + 15, 18, Math.PI, Math.PI * 2);
    bossCtx.fill();
    
    // Eyes
    bossCtx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a';
    bossCtx.beginPath();
    bossCtx.arc(battlePlayer.x + 20, battlePlayer.y + 18, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    bossCtx.arc(battlePlayer.x + 30, battlePlayer.y + 18, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    bossCtx.fill();
    
    // Legs
    bossCtx.fillStyle = '#4a4a4a';
    bossCtx.fillRect(battlePlayer.x + 12, battlePlayer.y + 55, 10, 15);
    bossCtx.fillRect(battlePlayer.x + 28, battlePlayer.y + 55, 10, 15);
}

function updateBossUI() {
    // Boss health
    const bossHealthFill = document.querySelector('.boss-health-fill');
    if (bossHealthFill) {
        bossHealthFill.style.width = `${(boss.health / boss.maxHealth) * 100}%`;
    }
    
    // Player health
    const playerHealthFill = document.querySelector('.player-health-bar .health-fill');
    const playerHealthText = document.querySelector('.player-health-bar .health-text');
    if (playerHealthFill && playerHealthText) {
        playerHealthFill.style.width = `${(battlePlayer.health / 100) * 150}px`;
        playerHealthText.textContent = Math.max(0, battlePlayer.health);
    }
}

// ============== DEATH SCREEN ==============

let deathSource = 'platformer'; // Track where player died

function showDeathScreen(source) {
    deathSource = source;
    
    // Stop game loops
    if (gameLoop) cancelAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
    if (bossLoop) cancelAnimationFrame(bossLoop);
    
    showScreen('death-screen');
}

function revivePlayer() {
    // Reset health
    GameState.health = 100;
    updateHealthUI();
    
    if (deathSource === 'platformer') {
        // Reset player position
        player.x = 100;
        player.y = 300;
        player.velocityX = 0;
        player.velocityY = 0;
        camera.x = 0;
        levelComplete = false;
        
        // Restart platformer
        startPlatformer();
    } else if (deathSource === 'boss') {
        // Reset boss battle
        battlePlayer.health = 100;
        battlePlayer.x = 200;
        boss.health = 100;
        boss.lastPlayerPositions = [];
        
        // Restart boss battle
        startBossBattle();
    }
}

// ============== UNLOCK SCREEN ==============

function showUnlockScreen() {
    showScreen('unlock-screen');
    
    // Add Zoink to pets
    GameState.pets.push({
        name: 'Zoink',
        rarity: 'Common',
        ability: 'Antler Swing'
    });
}

document.getElementById('continue-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
    showScreen('victory-screen');
});

document.getElementById('next-level-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
    // Would continue to level 2
    alert('Level 2 coming soon! Thanks for playing the demo!');
    showScreen('title-screen');
});

// Death screen buttons
document.getElementById('revive-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
    revivePlayer();
});

document.getElementById('quit-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
    // Reset everything and go to title
    GameState.health = 100;
    GameState.currentLevel = 1;
    levelComplete = false;
    showScreen('title-screen');
});

// ============== EVENT LISTENERS ==============

// Start button
document.getElementById('start-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
    showScreen('character-select');
});

// Character selection
document.querySelectorAll('.character-option').forEach(option => {
    option.addEventListener('click', () => {
        GameState.playerGender = option.dataset.gender;
        startCutscene('opening');
    });
});

// Keyboard controls
document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    keys[e.code] = true;
});

document.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => {
    keys[e.code] = false;
});

// ============== TOUCH CONTROLS ==============

// Helper function to handle touch buttons
function setupTouchButton(button) {
    const keyCode = button.dataset.key;
    
    // Touch start - simulate key press
    button.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        keys[keyCode] = true;
        button.classList.add('active');
    }, { passive: false });
    
    // Touch end - simulate key release
    button.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        keys[keyCode] = false;
        button.classList.remove('active');
    }, { passive: false });
    
    // Touch cancel
    button.addEventListener('touchcancel', (e) => {
        keys[keyCode] = false;
        button.classList.remove('active');
    });
    
    // Also support mouse for testing on desktop
    button.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        keys[keyCode] = true;
        button.classList.add('active');
    });
    
    button.addEventListener('mouseup', (e) => {
        keys[keyCode] = false;
        button.classList.remove('active');
    });
    
    button.addEventListener('mouseleave', (e) => {
        keys[keyCode] = false;
        button.classList.remove('active');
    });
}

// Setup all touch buttons when DOM is ready
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    // Setup touch controls for platformer
    document.querySelectorAll('#touch-controls .touch-btn').forEach(setupTouchButton);
    
    // Setup touch controls for boss battle
    document.querySelectorAll('#boss-touch-controls .touch-btn').forEach(setupTouchButton);
    
    // Setup touch abilities in boss battle
    document.querySelectorAll('.touch-ability').forEach(ability => {
        const keyCode = ability.dataset.key;
        
        ability.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            keys[keyCode] = true;
            ability.classList.add('active');
            // Auto-release after short delay for attacks
            setTimeout(() => {
                keys[keyCode] = false;
                ability.classList.remove('active');
            }, 100);
        }, { passive: false });
        
        ability.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            keys[keyCode] = true;
            ability.classList.add('active');
            setTimeout(() => {
                keys[keyCode] = false;
                ability.classList.remove('active');
            }, 100);
        });
    });
});

// Prevent default touch behaviors on game screens
document.querySelectorAll('#game-screen, #boss-screen').forEach(screen => {
    screen.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
    }, { passive: false });
});

// Window resize
window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
    if (platformerCanvas) {
        platformerCanvas.width = window.innerWidth;
        platformerCanvas.height = window.innerHeight;
    }
    if (bossCanvas) {
        bossCanvas.width = window.innerWidth;
        bossCanvas.height = window.innerHeight;
    }
});

// Add CSS animation keyframes dynamically
const style = document.createElement('style');
style.textContent = `
    @keyframes shake {
        0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0); }
        25% { transform: translateX(-5px); }
        75% { transform: translateX(5px); }
    }
    @keyframes bounce {
        0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
        50% { transform: translateY(-10px); }
    }
    @keyframes slideRight {
        to { transform: translateX(200px); opacity: 0; }
    }
`;
document.head.appendChild(style);

console.log('Cosmic Zoo - Finding Belly loaded! 🎮');


```

I've fixed both issues! Here's what changed:

## ✅ Death/Revive Screen Added

When your HP reaches 0 (from falling or boss attacks), you'll see:
- **"YOU FELL!"** title
- **"Don't give up! Belly needs you!"** message
- **REVIVE button** - Restarts the current section with full health
- **Return to Menu button** - Goes back to title screen

## ✅ Moving Platforms Fixed

The moving platforms no longer kick you off! The collision detection is improved:
- Player now moves smoothly WITH the platform
- Better edge detection so you don't slip off
- Platform movement applied after collision for smoother feel

## 🎮 How Death Works Now:

**In Platformer:**
- Fall off = lose 25 HP
- If HP > 0: Respawn at start
- If HP = 0: Show death screen → Revive restarts level

**In Boss Battle:**
- Take damage from Zip's attacks
- If HP = 0: Show death screen → Revive restarts boss fight

Here's how to deploy the updated game to Vercel via PowerShell:

## Option 1: Quick Deploy (Recommended)

Open PowerShell and run:

```powershell
cd "C:\Users\dimit\Desktop\cosmic zoo"
vercel --prod
```

This will deploy directly to your production URL!

---

## Option 2: If you need to login first

```powershell
cd "C:\Users\dimit\Desktop\cosmic zoo"
vercel login
```
*(This opens your browser to login)*

Then:
```powershell
vercel --prod
```

---

## Option 3: Via Vercel Dashboard (No commands)

1. Go to [vercel.com](https://vercel.com) and log in
2. Find your "cosmic-zoo" project
3. Click on it
4. Click **"Redeploy"** on the latest deployment

Or drag the `cosmic zoo` folder from your Desktop into the Vercel dashboard to upload the new files.

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Cosmic Zoo - Finding Belly</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fredoka+One&family=Nunito:wght@400;700;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
</head>
<body>
    <div id="game-container">
        <!-- Title Screen -->
        <div id="title-screen" class="screen active">
            <div class="stars-bg"></div>
            <h1 class="game-title">COSMIC ZOO</h1>
            <h2 class="subtitle">Finding Belly</h2>
            <div class="belly-preview"></div>
            <p class="tagline">An adventure to rescue your best friend!</p>
            <button id="start-btn" class="main-btn">START GAME</button>
        </div>

        <!-- Character Select Screen -->
        <div id="character-select" class="screen">
            <div class="stars-bg"></div>
            <h2>Choose Your Character</h2>
            <div class="character-options">
                <div class="character-option" data-gender="male">
                    <div class="character-preview male-char"></div>
                    <p>Boy</p>
                </div>
                <div class="character-option" data-gender="female">
                    <div class="character-preview female-char"></div>
                    <p>Girl</p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Cutscene Screen -->
        <div id="cutscene-screen" class="screen">
            <div class="cutscene-bg"></div>
            <div class="cutscene-characters"></div>
            <div class="dialogue-box">
                <span class="speaker-name"></span>
                <p class="dialogue-text"></p>
                <span class="continue-prompt">Tap to continue...</span>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Game Screen -->
        <div id="game-screen" class="screen">
            <canvas id="game-canvas"></canvas>
            <div id="game-ui">
                <div class="health-bar">
                    <span>HP</span>
                    <div class="health-fill"></div>
                    <span class="health-text">100</span>
                </div>
                <div class="pet-display">
                    <div class="pet-icon zoink-icon"></div>
                    <span class="pet-name">Zoink</span>
                </div>
                <div class="ability-bar">
                    <div class="ability touch-ability" data-ability="pounce" data-key="Digit1">
                        <span class="key">1</span>
                        <span class="ability-name">Pounce</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ability touch-ability" data-ability="gun" data-key="Digit2">
                        <span class="key">2</span>
                        <span class="ability-name">Gun</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ability touch-ability" data-ability="special" data-key="Digit3">
                        <span class="key">3</span>
                        <span class="ability-name">Swing</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <!-- Touch Controls for Mobile/Tablet -->
            <div id="touch-controls">
                <div class="touch-left">
                    <button class="touch-btn move-left" data-key="ArrowLeft">◀</button>
                    <button class="touch-btn move-right" data-key="ArrowRight">▶</button>
                </div>
                <div class="touch-right">
                    <button class="touch-btn jump-btn" data-key="Space">JUMP</button>
                    <button class="touch-btn swing-btn" data-key="Digit3">SWING</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Boss Battle Screen -->
        <div id="boss-screen" class="screen">
            <canvas id="boss-canvas"></canvas>
            <div id="boss-ui">
                <div class="boss-health-container">
                    <span class="boss-name">THE ZIP</span>
                    <div class="boss-health-bar">
                        <div class="boss-health-fill"></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="player-health-bar">
                    <span>HP</span>
                    <div class="health-fill"></div>
                    <span class="health-text">100</span>
                </div>
                <div class="battle-abilities">
                    <div class="ability touch-ability" data-ability="pounce" data-key="Digit1">
                        <span class="key">1</span>
                        <span class="ability-name">Pounce</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ability touch-ability" data-ability="gun" data-key="Digit2">
                        <span class="key">2</span>
                        <span class="ability-name">Gun</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ability touch-ability" data-ability="special" data-key="Digit3">
                        <span class="key">3</span>
                        <span class="ability-name">Swing</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <!-- Touch Controls for Mobile/Tablet -->
            <div id="boss-touch-controls">
                <div class="touch-left">
                    <button class="touch-btn move-left" data-key="ArrowLeft">◀</button>
                    <button class="touch-btn move-right" data-key="ArrowRight">▶</button>
                </div>
                <div class="touch-right">
                    <button class="touch-btn jump-btn" data-key="Space">JUMP</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Pet Unlock Screen (Genshin Style) -->
        <div id="unlock-screen" class="screen">
            <div class="unlock-bg">
                <div class="unlock-rays"></div>
                <div class="unlock-particles"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="unlock-content">
                <h2 class="unlock-title">NEW PET UNLOCKED!</h2>
                <div class="unlock-pet-container">
                    <div class="unlock-pet zoink-unlock"></div>
                </div>
                <h3 class="unlock-pet-name">ZOINK</h3>
                <div class="rarity-stars">
                    <span class="rarity-label">COMMON</span>
                </div>
                <p class="pet-description">A friendly deer-pig hybrid with powerful antlers!</p>
                <p class="ability-desc">Special Ability: Antler Swing</p>
                <button id="continue-btn" class="main-btn">CONTINUE</button>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Victory Screen -->
        <div id="victory-screen" class="screen">
            <div class="stars-bg"></div>
            <h1>LEVEL 1 COMPLETE!</h1>
            <p>You defeated Zip and got your money back!</p>
            <p>Zoink has joined your team!</p>
            <button id="next-level-btn" class="main-btn">Continue Adventure</button>
            <button id="replay-level-btn" class="secondary-btn" style="margin-top: 15px;">Replay Level 1</button>
            <button id="replay-boss-btn" class="secondary-btn" style="margin-top: 10px;">Replay Boss Battle</button>
        </div>

        <!-- Death/Revive Screen -->
        <div id="death-screen" class="screen">
            <div class="death-bg"></div>
            <div class="death-content">
                <h1 class="death-title">YOU FELL!</h1>
                <p class="death-message">Don't give up! Belly needs you!</p>
                <div class="death-character"></div>
                <button id="revive-btn" class="main-btn revive-btn">REVIVE</button>
                <button id="quit-btn" class="secondary-btn">Return to Menu</button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script src="game.js"></script>
</body>
</html>


```

```javascript
// Cosmic Zoo - Finding Belly
// Main Game Logic

// Game State
const GameState = {
    currentScreen: 'title',
    playerGender: null,
    currentLevel: 1,
    health: 100,
    maxHealth: 100,
    pets: [],
    currentPet: null,
    cutsceneIndex: 0,
    bossHealth: 100,
    bossMaxHealth: 100
};

// Screen Management
function showScreen(screenId) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.screen').forEach(screen => {
        screen.classList.remove('active');
    });
    document.getElementById(screenId).classList.add('active');
    GameState.currentScreen = screenId;
}

// Cutscene Data for Level 1
const cutscenes = {
    opening: [
        { speaker: 'Owner', text: 'What a beautiful day, Belly!', characters: ['owner', 'belly'], bg: 'peaceful' },
        { speaker: 'Belly', text: 'Nod nod!', characters: ['owner', 'belly'], bg: 'peaceful' },
        { speaker: 'Owner', text: 'Hah yeah!', characters: ['owner', 'belly'], bg: 'peaceful' },
        { speaker: 'Mysterious Figure', text: '...', characters: ['owner', 'belly', 'shadow'], bg: 'dark' },
        { speaker: 'Belly', text: 'NO! NO!', characters: ['belly-grabbed'], bg: 'dark' },
        { speaker: 'Owner', text: 'BELLY!!!', characters: ['owner-reaching'], bg: 'dark' },
        { speaker: 'Owner', text: 'How could this be...', characters: ['owner-sad'], bg: 'sad' },
        { speaker: 'Owner', text: 'I have to find Belly! No matter what!', characters: ['owner-determined'], bg: 'determined' }
    ],
    zipAppears: [
        { speaker: 'Zip', text: 'Well well well...', characters: ['owner', 'zip'], bg: 'encounter' },
        { speaker: 'Owner', text: 'What is that?', characters: ['owner', 'zip'], bg: 'encounter' },
        { speaker: 'Zip', text: 'Yoink! Your money is mine now!', characters: ['owner-fallen', 'zip'], bg: 'encounter' },
        { speaker: 'Zip', text: 'Bye! Hehehe!', characters: ['owner-fallen', 'zip-leaving'], bg: 'encounter' },
        { speaker: 'Owner', text: 'Ugh! My money!', characters: ['owner-fallen'], bg: 'sad' }
    ],
    meetZoink: [
        { speaker: 'Owner', text: 'What is that?', characters: ['owner', 'zoink'], bg: 'encounter' },
        { speaker: 'Owner', text: 'Here, take some food little guy.', characters: ['owner-giving', 'zoink'], bg: 'kind' },
        { speaker: 'Zoink', text: 'Yay! Thank you!', characters: ['owner', 'zoink-happy'], bg: 'happy' },
        { speaker: 'Owner', text: 'Wanna be friends?', characters: ['owner', 'zoink-happy'], bg: 'happy' },
        { speaker: 'Zoink', text: 'Nod nod!', characters: ['owner', 'zoink-happy'], bg: 'happy' },
        { speaker: 'Zoink', text: 'Come on! I know where that thief went!', characters: ['owner', 'zoink-pointing'], bg: 'determined' },
        { speaker: 'Owner', text: 'Really? Maybe you can help me find my pet Belly too!', characters: ['owner-hopeful', 'zoink'], bg: 'determined' },
        { speaker: 'Zoink', text: 'I heard there is a dungeon where they keep captured pets. Let us go!', characters: ['owner', 'zoink'], bg: 'determined' }
    ],
    beforeBoss: [
        { speaker: 'Zip', text: 'How did you get here?!', characters: ['owner', 'zoink', 'zip-angry'], bg: 'boss' },
        { speaker: 'Owner', text: 'Give me back my money!', characters: ['owner-angry', 'zoink', 'zip'], bg: 'boss' },
        { speaker: 'Zip', text: 'How dare you! You want it? Come and get it!', characters: ['owner', 'zoink', 'zip-battle'], bg: 'boss' }
    ],
    afterBoss: [
        { speaker: 'Zip', text: 'Argggh! Fine, take your stupid money!', characters: ['owner', 'zoink', 'zip-defeated'], bg: 'victory' },
        { speaker: 'Owner', text: 'Yes! We did it!', characters: ['owner-happy', 'zoink-happy'], bg: 'victory' },
        { speaker: 'Zoink', text: 'Yay! We won!', characters: ['owner-happy', 'zoink-happy'], bg: 'victory' },
        { speaker: 'Owner', text: 'Thank you so much for your help, Zoink!', characters: ['owner-happy', 'zoink'], bg: 'victory' },
        { speaker: 'Zoink', text: 'I want to come with you! Let us find Belly together!', characters: ['owner', 'zoink-excited'], bg: 'victory' }
    ]
};

let currentCutscene = null;
let currentDialogueIndex = 0;

// Cutscene System
function startCutscene(cutsceneName) {
    currentCutscene = cutscenes[cutsceneName];
    currentDialogueIndex = 0;
    showScreen('cutscene-screen');
    showDialogue();
}

function showDialogue() {
    if (currentDialogueIndex >= currentCutscene.length) {
        endCutscene();
        return;
    }

    const dialogue = currentCutscene[currentDialogueIndex];
    const speakerEl = document.querySelector('.speaker-name');
    const textEl = document.querySelector('.dialogue-text');
    const bgEl = document.querySelector('.cutscene-bg');
    const charsEl = document.querySelector('.cutscene-characters');

    speakerEl.textContent = dialogue.speaker;
    
    // Typewriter effect
    textEl.textContent = '';
    let charIndex = 0;
    const typeInterval = setInterval(() => {
        if (charIndex < dialogue.text.length) {
            textEl.textContent += dialogue.text[charIndex];
            charIndex++;
        } else {
            clearInterval(typeInterval);
        }
    }, 30);

    // Update background based on mood
    updateCutsceneBg(dialogue.bg);
    
    // Update characters
    updateCutsceneCharacters(dialogue.characters);
}

function updateCutsceneBg(mood) {
    const bgEl = document.querySelector('.cutscene-bg');
    switch(mood) {
        case 'peaceful':
            bgEl.style.background = 'linear-gradient(180deg, #87CEEB 0%, #b8e4f9 60%, #90EE90 60%, #228B22 100%)';
            break;
        case 'dark':
            bgEl.style.background = 'linear-gradient(180deg, #2c2c54 0%, #1a1a2e 60%, #1a1a1a 100%)';
            break;
        case 'sad':
            bgEl.style.background = 'linear-gradient(180deg, #636e72 0%, #b2bec3 60%, #636e72 100%)';
            break;
        case 'determined':
            bgEl.style.background = 'linear-gradient(180deg, #f39c12 0%, #e74c3c 60%, #8e44ad 100%)';
            break;
        case 'encounter':
            bgEl.style.background = 'linear-gradient(180deg, #87CEEB 0%, #dfe6e9 60%, #b2bec3 100%)';
            break;
        case 'kind':
        case 'happy':
            bgEl.style.background = 'linear-gradient(180deg, #fdcb6e 0%, #ffeaa7 60%, #81ecec 100%)';
            break;
        case 'boss':
            bgEl.style.background = 'linear-gradient(180deg, #2d3436 0%, #636e72 50%, #2d3436 100%)';
            break;
        case 'victory':
            bgEl.style.background = 'linear-gradient(180deg, #6c5ce7 0%, #a29bfe 50%, #fd79a8 100%)';
            break;
        default:
            bgEl.style.background = 'linear-gradient(180deg, #87CEEB 0%, #E0F6FF 100%)';
    }
}

function updateCutsceneCharacters(characters) {
    const container = document.querySelector('.cutscene-characters');
    container.innerHTML = '';

    characters.forEach((char, index) => {
        const charEl = document.createElement('div');
        charEl.className = 'cutscene-character';
        charEl.style.left = `${20 + index * 30}%`;
        
        switch(char) {
            case 'owner':
            case 'owner-reaching':
            case 'owner-sad':
            case 'owner-determined':
            case 'owner-fallen':
            case 'owner-giving':
            case 'owner-hopeful':
            case 'owner-angry':
            case 'owner-happy':
                createOwnerSprite(charEl, char);
                break;
            case 'belly':
            case 'belly-grabbed':
                createBellySprite(charEl, char);
                break;
            case 'zoink':
            case 'zoink-happy':
            case 'zoink-pointing':
            case 'zoink-excited':
                createZoinkSprite(charEl, char);
                break;
            case 'zip':
            case 'zip-leaving':
            case 'zip-angry':
            case 'zip-battle':
            case 'zip-defeated':
                createZipSprite(charEl, char);
                break;
            case 'shadow':
                charEl.style.width = '100px';
                charEl.style.height = '150px';
                charEl.style.background = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.8)';
                charEl.style.borderRadius = '50% 50% 20% 20%';
                charEl.style.filter = 'blur(2px)';
                break;
        }
        
        container.appendChild(charEl);
    });
}

function createOwnerSprite(el, state) {
    const hairColor = GameState.playerGender === 'female' ? '#F5DEB3' : '#8B4513';
    const shirtColor = GameState.playerGender === 'female' ? '#FFB6C1' : '#4CAF50';
    
    el.style.width = '100px';
    el.style.height = '180px';
    el.style.background = `linear-gradient(180deg, ${hairColor} 0% 25%, #FFE4C4 25% 45%, ${shirtColor} 45% 100%)`;
    el.style.borderRadius = '40% 40% 20% 20%';
    el.style.position = 'relative';
    
    // Face
    const face = document.createElement('div');
    face.style.position = 'absolute';
    face.style.top = '28%';
    face.style.left = '50%';
    face.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%)';
    face.style.fontSize = '14px';
    
    if (state.includes('sad') || state.includes('fallen')) {
        face.textContent = '😢';
        face.style.fontSize = '24px';
    } else if (state.includes('happy')) {
        face.textContent = '😄';
        face.style.fontSize = '24px';
    } else if (state.includes('angry') || state.includes('determined')) {
        face.textContent = '😠';
        face.style.fontSize = '24px';
    } else if (state.includes('reaching')) {
        face.textContent = '😱';
        face.style.fontSize = '24px';
        el.style.transform = 'rotate(-10deg)';
    } else {
        face.textContent = '😊';
        face.style.fontSize = '24px';
    }
    
    el.appendChild(face);
}

function createBellySprite(el, state) {
    el.style.width = '120px';
    el.style.height = '100px';
    el.style.background = '#4CAF50';
    el.style.borderRadius = '50% 50% 50% 50% / 60% 60% 40% 40%';
    el.style.position = 'relative';
    
    // Eyes
    const eyes = document.createElement('div');
    eyes.style.position = 'absolute';
    eyes.style.top = '25%';
    eyes.style.left = '50%';
    eyes.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%)';
    eyes.textContent = '◉ ◉';
    eyes.style.fontSize = '18px';
    eyes.style.letterSpacing = '15px';
    el.appendChild(eyes);
    
    // Frog mouth
    const mouth = document.createElement('div');
    mouth.style.position = 'absolute';
    mouth.style.bottom = '25%';
    mouth.style.left = '50%';
    mouth.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%)';
    mouth.style.width = '30px';
    mouth.style.height = '10px';
    mouth.style.background = '#2d5a2e';
    mouth.style.borderRadius = '0 0 50% 50%';
    el.appendChild(mouth);
    
    if (state === 'belly-grabbed') {
        el.style.animation = 'shake 0.5s ease-in-out infinite';
        el.style.filter = 'brightness(0.7)';
    }
}

function createZoinkSprite(el, state) {
    el.style.width = '100px';
    el.style.height = '100px';
    el.style.background = '#FFD700';
    el.style.borderRadius = '50%';
    el.style.position = 'relative';
    
    // Antlers
    const antlerLeft = document.createElement('div');
    antlerLeft.style.position = 'absolute';
    antlerLeft.style.top = '-30px';
    antlerLeft.style.left = '15px';
    antlerLeft.style.width = '0';
    antlerLeft.style.height = '0';
    antlerLeft.style.borderLeft = '10px solid transparent';
    antlerLeft.style.borderRight = '10px solid transparent';
    antlerLeft.style.borderBottom = '35px solid #8B4513';
    el.appendChild(antlerLeft);
    
    const antlerRight = document.createElement('div');
    antlerRight.style.position = 'absolute';
    antlerRight.style.top = '-30px';
    antlerRight.style.right = '15px';
    antlerRight.style.width = '0';
    antlerRight.style.height = '0';
    antlerRight.style.borderLeft = '10px solid transparent';
    antlerRight.style.borderRight = '10px solid transparent';
    antlerRight.style.borderBottom = '35px solid #8B4513';
    el.appendChild(antlerRight);
    
    // Eyes
    const eyes = document.createElement('div');
    eyes.style.position = 'absolute';
    eyes.style.top = '25%';
    eyes.style.left = '50%';
    eyes.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%)';
    eyes.textContent = '● ●';
    eyes.style.fontSize = '16px';
    eyes.style.letterSpacing = '20px';
    el.appendChild(eyes);
    
    // Pig snout
    const snout = document.createElement('div');
    snout.style.position = 'absolute';
    snout.style.top = '50%';
    snout.style.left = '50%';
    snout.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%)';
    snout.style.width = '40px';
    snout.style.height = '25px';
    snout.style.background = '#FFB6C1';
    snout.style.borderRadius = '50%';
    el.appendChild(snout);
    
    // Nostrils
    const nostrils = document.createElement('div');
    nostrils.style.position = 'absolute';
    nostrils.style.top = '55%';
    nostrils.style.left = '50%';
    nostrils.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%)';
    nostrils.textContent = '• •';
    nostrils.style.fontSize = '12px';
    nostrils.style.letterSpacing = '8px';
    el.appendChild(nostrils);
    
    if (state.includes('happy') || state.includes('excited')) {
        el.style.animation = 'bounce 0.5s ease-in-out infinite';
        // Hearts
        const hearts = document.createElement('div');
        hearts.style.position = 'absolute';
        hearts.style.top = '-20px';
        hearts.style.left = '50%';
        hearts.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%)';
        hearts.textContent = '♥ ♥ ♥';
        hearts.style.color = '#FF6B6B';
        hearts.style.fontSize = '20px';
        el.appendChild(hearts);
    }
}

function createZipSprite(el, state) {
    el.style.width = '90px';
    el.style.height = '90px';
    el.style.background = '#1a1a1a';
    el.style.borderRadius = '50%';
    el.style.position = 'relative';
    
    // Scruffy fur effect
    el.style.boxShadow = `
        -5px -5px 0 #1a1a1a,
        5px -5px 0 #1a1a1a,
        -8px 0 0 #1a1a1a,
        8px 0 0 #1a1a1a
    `;
    
    // White eyes
    const eyes = document.createElement('div');
    eyes.style.position = 'absolute';
    eyes.style.top = '30%';
    eyes.style.left = '50%';
    eyes.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%)';
    eyes.textContent = '◉ ◉';
    eyes.style.fontSize = '18px';
    eyes.style.color = 'white';
    eyes.style.letterSpacing = '15px';
    el.appendChild(eyes);
    
    // Angry mouth with teeth
    const mouth = document.createElement('div');
    mouth.style.position = 'absolute';
    mouth.style.bottom = '20%';
    mouth.style.left = '50%';
    mouth.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%)';
    mouth.textContent = '▼▼▼';
    mouth.style.fontSize = '10px';
    mouth.style.color = 'white';
    el.appendChild(mouth);
    
    if (state.includes('angry') || state.includes('battle')) {
        el.style.animation = 'shake 0.3s ease-in-out infinite';
    }
    if (state.includes('defeated')) {
        el.style.filter = 'grayscale(50%)';
        el.style.transform = 'rotate(15deg)';
    }
    if (state.includes('leaving')) {
        el.style.animation = 'slideRight 0.5s ease-in-out forwards';
    }
}

function endCutscene() {
    // Determine what happens after cutscene
    if (currentCutscene === cutscenes.opening) {
        startCutscene('zipAppears');
    } else if (currentCutscene === cutscenes.zipAppears) {
        startCutscene('meetZoink');
    } else if (currentCutscene === cutscenes.meetZoink) {
        // Start platformer gameplay
        startPlatformer();
    } else if (currentCutscene === cutscenes.beforeBoss) {
        startBossBattle();
    } else if (currentCutscene === cutscenes.afterBoss) {
        showUnlockScreen();
    }
}

// Add click event for cutscene progression
document.getElementById('cutscene-screen').addEventListener('click', () => {
    currentDialogueIndex++;
    showDialogue();
});

// ============== PLATFORMER GAME ==============

let platformerCanvas, platformerCtx;
let gameLoop;
let platforms = [];
let player = {
    x: 100,
    y: 300,
    width: 50,
    height: 70,
    velocityX: 0,
    velocityY: 0,
    onGround: false,
    facingRight: true
};
let zoinkCompanion = {
    x: 60,
    y: 300,
    width: 40,
    height: 40
};
let camera = { x: 0, y: 0 };
let keys = {};
let swingPoints = [];
let isSwinging = false;
let swingAngle = 0;
let currentSwingPoint = null;
let levelComplete = false;

function startPlatformer() {
    showScreen('game-screen');
    platformerCanvas = document.getElementById('game-canvas');
    platformerCtx = platformerCanvas.getContext('2d');
    
    // Set canvas size
    platformerCanvas.width = window.innerWidth;
    platformerCanvas.height = window.innerHeight;
    
    // Reset player
    player.x = 100;
    player.y = 300;
    player.velocityX = 0;
    player.velocityY = 0;
    
    // Create level
    createLevel1();
    
    // Start game loop
    if (gameLoop) cancelAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
    gameLoop = requestAnimationFrame(updatePlatformer);
}

function createLevel1() {
    platforms = [];
    swingPoints = [];
    
    const canvasHeight = platformerCanvas.height;
    
    // Starting platform
    platforms.push({ x: 0, y: canvasHeight - 100, width: 300, height: 30, type: 'cloud' });
    
    // Platforms going right with some moving ones
    platforms.push({ x: 350, y: canvasHeight - 150, width: 150, height: 25, type: 'cloud' });
    platforms.push({ x: 550, y: canvasHeight - 220, width: 120, height: 25, type: 'cloud', moving: true, moveRange: 50, moveSpeed: 2 });
    platforms.push({ x: 750, y: canvasHeight - 280, width: 100, height: 25, type: 'cloud' });
    
    // Swing point section
    swingPoints.push({ x: 950, y: canvasHeight - 400 });
    platforms.push({ x: 1100, y: canvasHeight - 300, width: 120, height: 25, type: 'cloud' });
    
    // More platforms
    platforms.push({ x: 1300, y: canvasHeight - 350, width: 100, height: 25, type: 'cloud', moving: true, moveRange: 80, moveSpeed: 1.5 });
    platforms.push({ x: 1500, y: canvasHeight - 280, width: 150, height: 25, type: 'cloud' });
    
    // Second swing section
    swingPoints.push({ x: 1700, y: canvasHeight - 380 });
    swingPoints.push({ x: 1900, y: canvasHeight - 350 });
    
    platforms.push({ x: 2050, y: canvasHeight - 250, width: 150, height: 25, type: 'cloud' });
    platforms.push({ x: 2250, y: canvasHeight - 200, width: 120, height: 25, type: 'cloud', moving: true, moveRange: 60, moveSpeed: 2.5 });
    
    // Final stretch
    platforms.push({ x: 2450, y: canvasHeight - 150, width: 200, height: 25, type: 'cloud' });
    platforms.push({ x: 2700, y: canvasHeight - 180, width: 150, height: 25, type: 'cloud' });
    
    // End platform (boss area)
    platforms.push({ x: 2900, y: canvasHeight - 100, width: 400, height: 30, type: 'boss-platform', isEnd: true });
}

function updatePlatformer() {
    if (GameState.currentScreen !== 'game-screen') return;
    
    // Clear canvas
    platformerCtx.clearRect(0, 0, platformerCanvas.width, platformerCanvas.height);
    
    // Draw sky background
    drawSkyBackground();
    
    // Update moving platforms
    platforms.forEach(p => {
        if (p.moving) {
            if (!p.originalX) p.originalX = p.x;
            if (!p.direction) p.direction = 1;
            p.x += p.moveSpeed * p.direction;
            if (p.x > p.originalX + p.moveRange || p.x < p.originalX - p.moveRange) {
                p.direction *= -1;
            }
        }
    });
    
    // Player physics
    if (!isSwinging) {
        // Gravity
        player.velocityY += 0.8;
        
        // Movement
        if (keys['ArrowLeft'] || keys['KeyA']) {
            player.velocityX = -6;
            player.facingRight = false;
        } else if (keys['ArrowRight'] || keys['KeyD']) {
            player.velocityX = 6;
            player.facingRight = true;
        } else {
            player.velocityX *= 0.8;
        }
        
        // Jump
        if ((keys['ArrowUp'] || keys['KeyW'] || keys['Space']) && player.onGround) {
            player.velocityY = -18;
            player.onGround = false;
        }
        
        // Apply velocity
        player.x += player.velocityX;
        player.y += player.velocityY;
        
        // Platform collision - improved to not kick player off
        player.onGround = false;
        let onMovingPlatform = null;
        
        platforms.forEach(p => {
            // Calculate platform screen position
            const platScreenX = p.x - camera.x;
            
            // Check if player is above and landing on platform
            if (player.x + player.width - 10 > platScreenX && 
                player.x + 10 < platScreenX + p.width &&
                player.y + player.height >= p.y - 5 &&
                player.y + player.height <= p.y + p.height + 15 &&
                player.velocityY >= 0) {
                
                player.y = p.y - player.height;
                player.velocityY = 0;
                player.onGround = true;
                
                // Remember if on moving platform
                if (p.moving) {
                    onMovingPlatform = p;
                }
                
                // Check if reached end
                if (p.isEnd && !levelComplete) {
                    levelComplete = true;
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        startCutscene('beforeBoss');
                    }, 500);
                }
            }
        });
        
        // Apply moving platform movement AFTER collision check
        if (onMovingPlatform) {
            // Move player with platform smoothly
            player.x += onMovingPlatform.moveSpeed * onMovingPlatform.direction;
        }
        
        // Fall death - show death screen
        if (player.y > platformerCanvas.height + 100) {
            GameState.health -= 25;
            updateHealthUI();
            
            if (GameState.health <= 0) {
                showDeathScreen('platformer');
                return;
            } else {
                // Respawn at last checkpoint
                player.x = 100;
                player.y = 300;
                camera.x = 0;
            }
        }
        
        // Check for zero health
        if (GameState.health <= 0) {
            showDeathScreen('platformer');
            return;
        }
    } else {
        // Swinging physics
        swingAngle += 0.05;
        const swingRadius = 150;
        player.x = currentSwingPoint.x - camera.x + Math.sin(swingAngle) * swingRadius - player.width / 2;
        player.y = currentSwingPoint.y + Math.cos(swingAngle) * swingRadius - player.height / 2;
        
        // Release swing
        if (keys['Space'] || keys['ArrowUp'] || keys['KeyW']) {
            isSwinging = false;
            player.velocityX = Math.cos(swingAngle) * 15;
            player.velocityY = -Math.abs(Math.sin(swingAngle)) * 15;
            keys['Space'] = false;
            keys['ArrowUp'] = false;
            keys['KeyW'] = false;
        }
    }
    
    // Camera follow
    const targetCameraX = player.x - platformerCanvas.width / 3;
    camera.x += (targetCameraX - camera.x) * 0.1;
    if (camera.x < 0) camera.x = 0;
    
    // Draw platforms
    platforms.forEach(p => {
        drawCloud(p.x - camera.x, p.y, p.width, p.height, p.type === 'boss-platform');
    });
    
    // Draw swing points
    swingPoints.forEach(sp => {
        drawSwingPoint(sp.x - camera.x, sp.y);
        
        // Check if player can grab
        if (!isSwinging && keys['Digit3']) {
            const dist = Math.hypot(player.x + player.width/2 - (sp.x - camera.x), player.y - sp.y);
            if (dist < 200) {
                isSwinging = true;
                currentSwingPoint = sp;
                swingAngle = Math.atan2(player.x + player.width/2 - (sp.x - camera.x), player.y - sp.y);
                keys['Digit3'] = false;
            }
        }
    });
    
    // Draw swing rope
    if (isSwinging && currentSwingPoint) {
        platformerCtx.strokeStyle = '#8B4513';
        platformerCtx.lineWidth = 4;
        platformerCtx.beginPath();
        platformerCtx.moveTo(currentSwingPoint.x - camera.x, currentSwingPoint.y);
        platformerCtx.lineTo(player.x + player.width/2, player.y + player.height/2);
        platformerCtx.stroke();
    }
    
    // Draw Zoink companion
    zoinkCompanion.x = player.x - 40;
    zoinkCompanion.y = player.y + 20;
    drawZoink(zoinkCompanion.x, zoinkCompanion.y, 40);
    
    // Draw player
    drawPlayer(player.x, player.y);
    
    // Draw UI hints
    drawUIHints();
    
    gameLoop = requestAnimationFrame(updatePlatformer);
}

function drawSkyBackground() {
    // Sky gradient
    const gradient = platformerCtx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, platformerCanvas.height);
    gradient.addColorStop(0, '#87CEEB');
    gradient.addColorStop(0.5, '#B8E4F9');
    gradient.addColorStop(1, '#E0F6FF');
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = gradient;
    platformerCtx.fillRect(0, 0, platformerCanvas.width, platformerCanvas.height);
    
    // Background clouds
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5)';
    for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
        const x = ((i * 400) - camera.x * 0.3) % (platformerCanvas.width + 200) - 100;
        const y = 100 + i * 50;
        drawCloudShape(x, y, 100 + i * 20);
    }
}

function drawCloudShape(x, y, size) {
    platformerCtx.beginPath();
    platformerCtx.arc(x, y, size * 0.4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.arc(x + size * 0.3, y - size * 0.1, size * 0.35, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.arc(x + size * 0.6, y, size * 0.4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.arc(x + size * 0.3, y + size * 0.1, size * 0.3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.fill();
}

function drawCloud(x, y, width, height, isBoss) {
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = isBoss ? '#FFD700' : 'white';
    platformerCtx.shadowColor = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)';
    platformerCtx.shadowBlur = 10;
    platformerCtx.shadowOffsetY = 5;
    
    // Main cloud platform
    platformerCtx.beginPath();
    platformerCtx.ellipse(x + width/2, y + height/2, width/2, height, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.fill();
    
    // Fluffy top
    for (let i = 0; i < width; i += 30) {
        platformerCtx.beginPath();
        platformerCtx.arc(x + 15 + i, y, 20, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        platformerCtx.fill();
    }
    
    platformerCtx.shadowColor = 'transparent';
    
    if (isBoss) {
        // Draw "BOSS" indicator
        platformerCtx.fillStyle = '#DC143C';
        platformerCtx.font = 'bold 20px Fredoka One';
        platformerCtx.fillText('→ BOSS', x + width/2 - 40, y - 30);
    }
}

function drawSwingPoint(x, y) {
    // Antler hook (Zoink's antler swing point)
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = '#8B4513';
    platformerCtx.beginPath();
    platformerCtx.moveTo(x, y);
    platformerCtx.lineTo(x - 15, y - 40);
    platformerCtx.lineTo(x, y - 30);
    platformerCtx.lineTo(x + 15, y - 40);
    platformerCtx.closePath();
    platformerCtx.fill();
    
    // Glow effect
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.3)';
    platformerCtx.beginPath();
    platformerCtx.arc(x, y, 30, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.fill();
    
    // Label
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = '#FFD700';
    platformerCtx.font = '14px Nunito';
    platformerCtx.fillText('Press 3 to Swing!', x - 50, y + 50);
}

function drawZoink(x, y, size) {
    // Body
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = '#FFD700';
    platformerCtx.beginPath();
    platformerCtx.arc(x + size/2, y + size/2, size/2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.fill();
    
    // Antlers
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = '#8B4513';
    platformerCtx.beginPath();
    platformerCtx.moveTo(x + size * 0.3, y + size * 0.2);
    platformerCtx.lineTo(x + size * 0.15, y - size * 0.2);
    platformerCtx.lineTo(x + size * 0.35, y + size * 0.1);
    platformerCtx.fill();
    
    platformerCtx.beginPath();
    platformerCtx.moveTo(x + size * 0.7, y + size * 0.2);
    platformerCtx.lineTo(x + size * 0.85, y - size * 0.2);
    platformerCtx.lineTo(x + size * 0.65, y + size * 0.1);
    platformerCtx.fill();
    
    // Eyes
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a';
    platformerCtx.beginPath();
    platformerCtx.arc(x + size * 0.35, y + size * 0.4, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.arc(x + size * 0.65, y + size * 0.4, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.fill();
    
    // Pink snout
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = '#FFB6C1';
    platformerCtx.beginPath();
    platformerCtx.ellipse(x + size/2, y + size * 0.6, size * 0.2, size * 0.12, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.fill();
    
    // Nostrils
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a';
    platformerCtx.beginPath();
    platformerCtx.arc(x + size * 0.42, y + size * 0.6, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.arc(x + size * 0.58, y + size * 0.6, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.fill();
}

function drawPlayer(x, y) {
    const hairColor = GameState.playerGender === 'female' ? '#F5DEB3' : '#8B4513';
    const shirtColor = GameState.playerGender === 'female' ? '#FFB6C1' : '#4CAF50';
    
    // Body
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = shirtColor;
    platformerCtx.fillRect(x + 10, y + 30, 30, 40);
    
    // Head
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = '#FFE4C4';
    platformerCtx.beginPath();
    platformerCtx.arc(x + 25, y + 20, 18, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.fill();
    
    // Hair
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = hairColor;
    platformerCtx.beginPath();
    platformerCtx.arc(x + 25, y + 15, 18, Math.PI, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.fill();
    
    // Eyes
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a';
    const eyeOffsetX = player.facingRight ? 3 : -3;
    platformerCtx.beginPath();
    platformerCtx.arc(x + 20 + eyeOffsetX, y + 18, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.arc(x + 30 + eyeOffsetX, y + 18, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    platformerCtx.fill();
    
    // Legs
    platformerCtx.fillStyle = '#4a4a4a';
    platformerCtx.fillRect(x + 12, y + 55, 10, 15);
    platformerCtx.fillRect(x + 28, y + 55, 10, 15);
}

function drawUIHints() {
    // Only show keyboard hints on desktop (not touch devices)
    const isTouchDevice = ('ontouchstart' in window) || (navigator.maxTouchPoints > 0);
    
    if (!isTouchDevice && window.innerWidth > 1024) {
        platformerCtx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.7)';
        platformerCtx.fillRect(10, platformerCanvas.height - 80, 250, 70);
        platformerCtx.fillStyle = 'white';
        platformerCtx.font = '14px Nunito';
        platformerCtx.fillText('← → or A/D: Move', 20, platformerCanvas.height - 55);
        platformerCtx.fillText('↑ or W or Space: Jump', 20, platformerCanvas.height - 35);
        platformerCtx.fillText('3: Use Antler Swing (near hooks)', 20, platformerCanvas.height - 15);
    }
}

function updateHealthUI() {
    const healthFill = document.querySelector('#game-ui .health-fill');
    const healthText = document.querySelector('#game-ui .health-text');
    if (healthFill && healthText) {
        healthFill.style.width = `${(GameState.health / GameState.maxHealth) * 150}px`;
        healthText.textContent = GameState.health;
    }
}

// ============== BOSS BATTLE ==============

let bossCanvas, bossCtx;
let bossLoop;
let boss = {
    x: 600,
    y: 400,
    width: 100,
    height: 100,
    health: 100,
    maxHealth: 100,
    state: 'idle', // idle, punching, flying, landing
    targetX: 0,
    targetY: 0,
    flyTimer: 0,
    attackCooldown: 0,
    lastPlayerPositions: []
};
let battlePlayer = {
    x: 200,
    y: 400,
    width: 50,
    height: 70,
    velocityX: 0,
    velocityY: 0,
    onGround: true,
    health: 100,
    attackCooldown: 0
};
let dangerZone = null;
let bossVoiceLine = '';
let voiceLineTimer = 0;

function startBossBattle() {
    showScreen('boss-screen');
    bossCanvas = document.getElementById('boss-canvas');
    bossCtx = bossCanvas.getContext('2d');
    
    bossCanvas.width = window.innerWidth;
    bossCanvas.height = window.innerHeight;
    
    // Reset
    boss.health = 100;
    boss.state = 'idle';
    boss.attackCooldown = 60;
    battlePlayer.health = 100;
    battlePlayer.x = 200;
    battlePlayer.y = bossCanvas.height - 200;
    bossVoiceLine = 'HOW DARE YOU!';
    voiceLineTimer = 120;
    
    if (bossLoop) cancelAnimationFrame(bossLoop);
    bossLoop = requestAnimationFrame(updateBossBattle);
}

function updateBossBattle() {
    if (GameState.currentScreen !== 'boss-screen') return;
    
    // Clear
    bossCtx.clearRect(0, 0, bossCanvas.width, bossCanvas.height);
    
    // Draw background
    drawBossBackground();
    
    // Ground
    const groundY = bossCanvas.height - 100;
    bossCtx.fillStyle = '#2d3436';
    bossCtx.fillRect(0, groundY, bossCanvas.width, 100);
    
    // Update player
    updateBattlePlayer(groundY);
    
    // Store player position history (for delayed attack)
    boss.lastPlayerPositions.push({ x: battlePlayer.x, y: battlePlayer.y, time: Date.now() });
    if (boss.lastPlayerPositions.length > 180) { // 3 seconds at 60fps
        boss.lastPlayerPositions.shift();
    }
    
    // Update boss
    updateBoss(groundY);
    
    // Draw danger zone
    if (dangerZone) {
        bossCtx.fillStyle = 'rgba(220, 20, 60, 0.4)';
        bossCtx.beginPath();
        bossCtx.arc(dangerZone.x, dangerZone.y, 80, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        bossCtx.fill();
        
        bossCtx.strokeStyle = '#DC143C';
        bossCtx.lineWidth = 3;
        bossCtx.beginPath();
        bossCtx.arc(dangerZone.x, dangerZone.y, 80, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        bossCtx.stroke();
    }
    
    // Draw boss
    drawBoss();
    
    // Draw player
    drawBattlePlayer();
    
    // Draw Zoink companion
    drawZoink(battlePlayer.x - 50, battlePlayer.y + 20, 35);
    
    // Draw voice line
    if (voiceLineTimer > 0) {
        bossCtx.fillStyle = 'white';
        bossCtx.font = 'bold 24px Fredoka One';
        bossCtx.fillText(bossVoiceLine, boss.x - 50, boss.y - 70);
        voiceLineTimer--;
    }
    
    // Update UI
    updateBossUI();
    
    // Check win/lose
    if (boss.health <= 0) {
        setTimeout(() => {
            startCutscene('afterBoss');
        }, 1000);
        return;
    }
    
    if (battlePlayer.health <= 0) {
        // Show death screen instead of auto-reset
        showDeathScreen('boss');
        return;
    }
    
    bossLoop = requestAnimationFrame(updateBossBattle);
}

function drawBossBackground() {
    const gradient = bossCtx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, bossCanvas.height);
    gradient.addColorStop(0, '#1a1a2e');
    gradient.addColorStop(0.5, '#2d3436');
    gradient.addColorStop(1, '#1a1a1a');
    bossCtx.fillStyle = gradient;
    bossCtx.fillRect(0, 0, bossCanvas.width, bossCanvas.height);
    
    // Dramatic clouds
    bossCtx.fillStyle = 'rgba(100, 100, 100, 0.3)';
    for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
        drawCloudShape(100 + i * 300, 150 + i * 30, 150);
    }
}

function updateBattlePlayer(groundY) {
    // Movement
    if (keys['ArrowLeft'] || keys['KeyA']) {
        battlePlayer.velocityX = -5;
    } else if (keys['ArrowRight'] || keys['KeyD']) {
        battlePlayer.velocityX = 5;
    } else {
        battlePlayer.velocityX *= 0.8;
    }
    
    // Jump
    if ((keys['ArrowUp'] || keys['KeyW'] || keys['Space']) && battlePlayer.onGround) {
        battlePlayer.velocityY = -15;
        battlePlayer.onGround = false;
    }
    
    // Gravity
    if (!battlePlayer.onGround) {
        battlePlayer.velocityY += 0.8;
    }
    
    // Apply velocity
    battlePlayer.x += battlePlayer.velocityX;
    battlePlayer.y += battlePlayer.velocityY;
    
    // Ground collision
    if (battlePlayer.y + battlePlayer.height > groundY) {
        battlePlayer.y = groundY - battlePlayer.height;
        battlePlayer.velocityY = 0;
        battlePlayer.onGround = true;
    }
    
    // Bounds
    if (battlePlayer.x < 0) battlePlayer.x = 0;
    if (battlePlayer.x + battlePlayer.width > bossCanvas.width) {
        battlePlayer.x = bossCanvas.width - battlePlayer.width;
    }
    
    // Attack cooldown
    if (battlePlayer.attackCooldown > 0) battlePlayer.attackCooldown--;
    
    // Attacks
    if (keys['Digit1'] && battlePlayer.attackCooldown === 0) {
        // Pounce attack
        performPounceAttack();
        battlePlayer.attackCooldown = 30;
    }
    if (keys['Digit2'] && battlePlayer.attackCooldown === 0) {
        // Gun attack
        performGunAttack();
        battlePlayer.attackCooldown = 45;
    }
}

function performPounceAttack() {
    const dist = Math.hypot(battlePlayer.x - boss.x, battlePlayer.y - boss.y);
    if (dist < 150) {
        boss.health -= 10;
        bossVoiceLine = 'ARGH!';
        voiceLineTimer = 60;
    }
}

function performGunAttack() {
    // Always hits but less damage
    boss.health -= 5;
    
    // Draw projectile effect (simple)
    bossCtx.strokeStyle = '#FFD700';
    bossCtx.lineWidth = 3;
    bossCtx.beginPath();
    bossCtx.moveTo(battlePlayer.x + battlePlayer.width, battlePlayer.y + battlePlayer.height / 2);
    bossCtx.lineTo(boss.x, boss.y + boss.height / 2);
    bossCtx.stroke();
}
```
